design_philosophy: A clean, trustworthy, and authoritative academic platform. It must feel like an official utility for IET Gorakhpur University—prioritizing clarity, function, and institutional pride over decorative fluff. Mobile-first responsive for students on the go.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for landing, dense/compact (p-4) for dashboard/forms.
layout.grid: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode) for the Admin Dashboard. Standard masonry or uniform grid for Item Browsing.
layout.corners: rounded-md (subtle 6px-8px radius to maintain an institutional, non-playful look)
layout.borders: 1px solid border-border. Use cardless layouts where possible or strict grid borders to feel technical and organized.
layout.shadows: shadow-sm for interactive elements, avoid large diffuse shadows. Flat UI preferred.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary uses #1E3A8A background, white text. No rounded-full pills—stick to rounded-md.
components.forms: Shadcn Input, Select, DatePicker, Textarea. Left-aligned labels. Use solid flat surfaces for inputs.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: shadow-md, slight border darken.
components.navigation: Sticky header with Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border). Must include IET Gorakhpur branding/logo text.
components.badges: Used for Lost/Found status. Solid background with high contrast text (e.g., bg-red-100 text-red-800 for Lost).

motion.hover: Explicit text color changes, subtle background shifts. Buttons slight scale (scale-[1.02]).
motion.page_transitions: Minimalist fade-in. Staggered entrance for item grids.

images.description: Students walking past a historic university building on a sunny day. Use as background for the landing hero section with a gradient overlay (bg-white/90 to bg-white/40) to ensure text readability.
Group of college students standing in front of a building. Use for About or Community sections.
Keys and wallet on a surface. Use as a sample image for 'Lost Wallet & Keys' report.
Ray-Ban sunglasses beside a brown leather wallet. Use as a sample image for found items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is used for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Load from Google Fonts or Fontshare.
The UI must feel like an official university app. Do not use generic purple or teal gradients. Rely on the Deep Academic Blue (#1E3A8A).
For the Landing page, implement a clear 'Report Lost' and 'Report Found' dual-action hero section over the hero_background image with a heavy white/glass overlay.
Dashboard and Item Grid must be mobile-first. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/landing sections and Shadcn for the app/dashboard interfaces.
Use data-testid on all buttons, links, and forms for testing.
Implement the 'Control Room' dense grid style for the Admin Dashboard.
NEVER use placeholder images; rely strictly on the provided URLs in the media section.
For the Search bar, include functional filters (Category, Location: e.g., Library, Hostel, Lab, Date).
